reasoning: Base rate analysis of Orly (Paris) climate: Average daily temp for Nov 9 is ~8.8°C. Nov 16 expected mean is ~7.8°C (Diff = -1.0°C). Dec 9 expected mean is ~5.7°C (Diff = -3.1°C). Feb 7 expected mean is ~5.1°C (Diff = -3.7°C). Assuming daily variations have a standard deviation over these intervals of ~5 to 6°C, the Z-scores for exceeding the Nov 9 temperature decrease as winter cold sets in. Consequently, despite the generic instruction that probabilities for distant dates should be closer to 0.5, the seasonal drift pushes the expected values further from initial means, thus dropping the probability of warmer temperatures well below 0.5.
